name: Game: Shadowrun Returns (BepInEx-aware)
author: MartinMouritzen
description: Shadowrun Returns support with BepInEx mod handling: content-pack mods deploy to ContentPacks (as the built-in extension does), while BepInEx-structured mods (e.g. the AI Voice Pack) deploy to the game root. Superset of Vortex's built-in Shadowrun Returns extension. See vortex/README.md for the built-in-extension conflict note and the preferred PR route.
